CREATE TABLE test_schema.test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data TEXT);
ALTER TABLE test_schema.test_table SET READ WRITE;
CREATE TABLE test_schema.read_only_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT);
ALTER TABLE test_schema.read_only_table SET READ ONLY;
CREATE TABLE test_schema.insert_only_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100));
ALTER TABLE test_schema.insert_only_table SET INSERT ONLY;
CREATE TABLE test_schema.complex_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, ref_id INT, value DECIMAL(10,2));
ALTER TABLE test_schema.complex_table SET READ WRITE;
ALTER TABLE test_schema.complex_table SET READ ONLY;
ALTER TABLE test_schema.complex_table SET INSERT ONLY;
ALTER TABLE test_schema.complex_table SET READ WRITE;
CREATE TABLE test_schema.nested_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, detail_id INT, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_schema.nested_table (id, detail_id, description) VALUES (1, 100, 'First Entry');
ALTER TABLE test_schema.nested_table SET READ WRITE;
SELECT * FROM test_schema.nested_table WHERE id = (SELECT max(id) FROM test_schema.nested_table);
ALTER TABLE test_schema.nested_table SET READ WRITE;
ALTER TABLE test_schema.insert_only_table SET READ WRITE;
CREATE TABLE test_schema.multi_table_1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT);
CREATE TABLE test_schema.multi_table_2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, amount DECIMAL(10,2));
ALTER TABLE test_schema.multi_table_1 SET READ WRITE;
ALTER TABLE test_schema.multi_table_2 SET READ WRITE;
INSERT INTO test_schema.multi_table_1 (id, user_id) VALUES (1, 30);
INSERT INTO test_schema.multi_table_2 (id, user_id, amount) VALUES (1, 30, 150.75);
SELECT * FROM test_schema.multi_table_1 m1 JOIN test_schema.multi_table_2 m2 ON m1.id = m2.user_id WHERE m2.amount > 100;
